---
title: "Methodology Paper"
subtitle: "Prospective Scaffold for the John Brown Case"
author: "Andrew Hammer"
date: last-modified
bibliography: references.bib
abstract: |
  This is a scaffold for a future methodology paper. No methodology findings
  from the John Brown case have yet been approved.
---

# Status

No methodology paper is available yet.

The John Brown project is a prospective second case for evaluating the governed
AI-assisted scholarly build-system method. Findings must be drafted from
case-study records and approved at the methodology-findings human gate before
this paper can make substantive claims.
